name: pagination-step
title: BTPaginationStep
description: Guided tour organism (BTPaginationStepTour). Renders a darkened backdrop with a spotlight cutout around the active step's target and a positioned BTTooltipStep balloon. Drive the active index with the step prop + onStepChange.
